document.title: AC/DC ADAPTOR BM090S15F02 Approval Sheet
document.documentType: Approval sheet, specification, test procedure, parts list, drawings, and agency approval sheet

sourceSummary.oneLine: BridgePower approval sheet for AC/DC adaptor model BM090S15F02 with electrical specifications, test procedure, parts list, drawings, and UL/CB agency approval information.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory and technical documentation for the AC/DC adaptor, including safety approvals and component specifications.
keyPoints: Model BM090S15F02 is an AC/DC adaptor rated for AC 100-240V input and +15.5VDC at 5.8A output.
The specification lists CE compliance, EMC directive compliance, Energy Star efficiency, leakage current, dielectric withstand, and protection features.
UL Certificate of Compliance E302267 covers AC/DC adaptor model families B(1)090(2)(3)(4) and (1)E90(2)(3)(4)(5)(6).
CB Test Certificate DK-146656-UL was issued by UL Solutions (Demko) for AC/DC adaptor model family B(1)090(2)(3)(4).

evidence.claim: The source document is dated 2024-03-05.
The document is an approval sheet for an AC/DC adaptor.
evidence.evidenceText: APPROVAL SHEET APPROVAL ITEM : AC/DC ADAPTOR

evidence.claim: The product model is BM090S15F02.
evidence.evidenceText: MODEL : BM090S15F02

evidence.claim: BridgePower is identified on the approval sheet.
evidence.evidenceText: BRIDGEPOWER CORP. 964, Gosaek-dongm,Gwonsun-gu, Suwon-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea

evidence.claim: The revision history lists Rev. A as released on 2023.03.09.
evidence.evidenceText: Revision Description PREP. CHKD APPD DATE Rev. A Released H.D Ahn 2023.03.09

evidence.claim: The adaptor rated input voltage is AC 100-240V.
evidence.evidenceText: INPUT * Rated Voltage AC 100 - 240V

evidence.claim: The adaptor voltage range is AC 90-264V.
evidence.evidenceText: * Voltage Range AC 90 - 264V

evidence.claim: The adaptor rated line frequency is 50-60Hz.
evidence.evidenceText: * Rated Line Frequency 50 - 60Hz

evidence.claim: The adaptor output is capable of supplying +15.5VDC at 5.8A.
evidence.evidenceText: OUTPUT * Capable of Supplying +15.5VDC at 5.8A

evidence.claim: The adaptor includes over-current, over-voltage, short-circuit, and thermal protection specifications.
evidence.evidenceText: * Over Current Protection 130% ~ 180% (7.54A ~10.44A) * Over Voltage Protection 130% ~ 150% (20.15V ~ 23.25V) * Short circuit Protection Short across the output terminals will not cause damage to the unit. Hiccup Mode , Auto recovery * Thermal Protection: Will shutdown upon an overtemperature condition, auto-recovery.

evidence.claim: The specification states CE compliance and EMC directive compliance.
evidence.evidenceText: * EMI Complies with EMC Directives * CE CE Compliant

evidence.claim: The average efficiency is specified as 88% minimum.
evidence.evidenceText: * Average Efficiency 88% minimum (at End of Output Cable.)

evidence.claim: UL Certificate of Compliance E302267 covers representative samples of AC/DC adaptors.
evidence.evidenceText: CERTIFICATE OF COMPLIANCE Certificate Number 2016-03-25; 2017-02-16(A1); 2023-10-25(A2)-E302267 ... This is to certify that representative samples of AC/DC Adaptor

evidence.claim: The UL certificate names model families B(1)090(2)(3)(4) and (1)E90(2)(3)(4)(5)(6).
The UL Certificate of Compliance standards are ANSI/AAMI ES 60601-1:2005/A2:2021 and CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 (Amendment 2:2022).
evidence.evidenceText: Standard(s) for Safety: ANSI/AAMI ES 60601-1:2005/A2:2021, CAN/CSA-C22.2 No. 60601-1 (Amendment 2:2022)

evidence.claim: CB Test Certificate DK-146656-UL applies to an AC/DC adaptor.
evidence.evidenceText: Ref. Certif. No. DK-146656-UL ... CB TEST CERTIFICATE Product AC/DC Adaptor

evidence.claim: The CB Test Certificate was issued by UL Solutions (Demko).
evidence.evidenceText: This CB Test Certificate is issued by the National Certification Body ... UL Solutions (Demko), Borupvang 5A DK-2750 Ballerup, DENMARK

evidence.claim: The CB Test Certificate date is 2023-10-30.
evidence.evidenceText: Date: 2023-10-30 Signature: Thomas Wilson

evidence.claim: The CB Test Certificate states the product sample conformed to IEC 60601-1:2005 with AMD1:2012 and AMD2:2020.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of the product was tested and found to be in conformity with IEC 60601-1:2005, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD2:2020

evidence.claim: The CB certificate states that risk management requirements of the standard were not addressed.
evidence.evidenceText: The risk management requirements of the standard were not addressed

reviewFlags.reason: The source contains multiple dates: approval sheet date 2024-03-05, revision release date 2023.03.09, UL certificate dates through 2023-10-25, CB certificate date 2023-10-30, and parts list timestamp 2024/02/23.
The productSignal is Unclassified even though the text identifies an AC/DC adaptor model BM090S15F02.
Authority signal is general; source text includes UL LLC, IECEE CB Scheme, and UL Solutions (Demko) as certification-related bodies.
Some OCR/text quality issues are present, including misspellings and malformed text such as 'Gosaek-dongm', 'DESCRIPITION', and garbled Korean/encoding in the parts list.
The document includes broad model-family certification language; direct equivalence of BM090S15F02 to a listed family member is inferred only from the model naming pattern and document context.
